articles.title: Oil prices slide after Pakistan announces deal between US and Iran
articles.description: Under the agreement, the key Strait of Hormuz waterway will be reopened, US President Donald Trump said.

articles.title: Starmer set to ban under-16s from major social media platforms
articles.description: The prime minister promises "bold action" ahead of Monday's announcement on restrictions for children.

articles.title: Roy Hattersley, former Labour deputy leader, dies aged 93
articles.description: Paying tribute, Sir Keir Starmer said Lord Hattersley "was a giant of the Labour movement".

articles.title: Royal Marines board Russian shadow fleet oil tanker in English Channel
articles.description: Marines were joined by National Crime Agency officers in the six-hour long operation in the early hours of Sunday.
